threats_reviewed: Compromised read-path can trip a kill by side-effect -> MITIGATED: kill_switches.py has no write helpers; write path is a separate module.
Malicious reason string exceeding audit-line safety -> MITIGATED: reason trimmed to 200 chars server-side; JSONL line size bounded.
Symbol injection (POST body `symbol=../../etc/passwd`) -> MITIGATED: _normalise_scope raises ValueError on unknown symbol; only exact-match against SUPPORTED_SYMBOLS + GLOBAL_KEY.
Race between activate and read -> MITIGATED: mtime cache invalidates deterministically; write path calls reset_cache_for_tests() at the end of every mutation.
Unauthenticated POST to activate on non-localhost -> MITIGATED: install-token gate (F006) applies; test_activate_requires_install_token_on_non_localhost_semantics pins the 401.
Rate-limit bypass on activate -> MITIGATED: activate POSTs pass through the F009 rate limiter via _install_gate_pass().
notes: Sprint 2's second safety layer. All threats close cleanly. No wiring to live orders (D065 invariant preserved).
